title: Yellow Plastic Cleaning Caddy Cleaners Carry All Basket Tote Tray …
features: Plastic Cleaning Caddy - Ideal for Cleaners, DIY Tools, Crafters etc
description: Silver carry all plastic caddy. Ideal for storing all plastic bottles full of cleaning fluids etc. Comfy grip handle. 3 Seperate storage compartments. Overall Size 41cm x 30cm Large Compartment Size: 35cm x 10cm 2 Smaller Compartments Size: 16cm x 9.5cm Fits most bottles with ease unlike cheaper models on the market.
